name: canshare-tnm8-female-genital-ovary-fallopian-peritoneal-cn
title: NZ AJCC (8th edition) female genital ovary and/or fallopian tube and/or primary peritoneal carcinoma clinical N category
description: A clinical regional lymph node stage (cN) of a ovary, fallopian tube and/or primary peritoneal carcinoma before initiation of treatment, using the AJCC cancer staging manual (8th edition).
